title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Medtronic India

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Medtronic India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Medical Officer looking for your next big career move? Medtronic India in Ludhiana offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Medtronic India:
Medtronic India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Medtronic India!
